title: Sticky Side Piston
description: Adds a green slime texture to the sides of sticky pistons for clear visual indication. Works with almost all Minecraft versions, requiring JSON from 1.6.1 and later.
body:
### Sticky Side Piston Resource Pack
This small resource pack adds subtle green slime to the sides of sticky pistons, making them more noticeable while staying true to the style by Notch or Jeb (depending on what version your installing). I think [Mumbo Jumbo](https://www.youtube.com/@ThatMumboJumbo) gave me the idea...

Simple yet useful for redstone enthusiasts. **I hope you won’t get on my sticky side...**
